title: neottia strateumatica
intro: Neottia strateumatica, also known as the "bee orchid", is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. In traditional herbal preparations, Neottia strateumatica is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
